004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021
022import java.lang.reflect.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
028
029/**
030 * Bridge for generating typed {@link JsonSchema} beans from Java types.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * {@link JsonSchemaGenerator} in <c>juneau-marshall</c> produces <c>JsonMap</c> output.  This class wraps that
034 * generator and converts the generated map into typed <c>JsonSchema</c> beans in <c>juneau-bean-jsonschema</c>.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
037 * <p class='bjava'>
038 *    <jc>// Default generation.</jc>
039 *    JsonSchema <jv>s1</jv> = JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.generate(MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
040 *
041 *    <jc>// Custom generation with bean defs and descriptions.</jc>
042 *    JsonSchema <jv>s2</jv> = JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.<jsm>create</jsm>()
043 *       .useBeanDefs()
044 *       .addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory.<jsf>ANY</jsf>)
045 *       .build()
046 *       .generate(MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
047 * </p>
048 */
049public final class JsonSchemaBeanGenerator {
050
051   /** Reusable default instance. */
052   public static final JsonSchemaBeanGenerator DEFAULT = create().build();
053
054   /** Creates a new builder. */
055   public static Builder create() {
056      return new Builder();
057   }
058
059   private final JsonSchemaGenerator generator;
060
061   private JsonSchemaBeanGenerator(Builder builder) {
062      this.generator = builder.generatorBuilder.build();
063   }
064
065   /**
066    * Generates a schema bean from a Java type.
067    *
068    * @param type The Java type.
069    * @return The generated schema bean.
070    */
071   public JsonSchema generate(Type type) {
072      assertArgNotNull("type", type);
073      try {
074         var session = generator.getSession();
075         var root = session.getSchema(type);
076         if (root == null)
077            return null;
078         var defs = session.getBeanDefs();
079         if (defs != null && ! defs.isEmpty())
080            root.append("$defs", defs);
081         return toBean(root);
082      } catch (Exception e) {
083         throw toRex(e);
084      }
085   }
086
087   /**
088    * Generates a schema bean from a Java class.
089    *
090    * @param type The Java class.
091    * @return The generated schema bean.
092    */
093   public JsonSchema generate(Class<?> type) {
094      return generate((Type)type);
095   }
096
097   /**
098    * Generates a schema bean from an object.
099    *
100    * <p>
101    * The value can be a POJO or a <c>Class</c>/<c>Type</c>.
102    *
103    * @param o The value to infer a schema from.
104    * @return The generated schema bean.
105    */
106   public JsonSchema generate(Object o) {
107      assertArgNotNull("o", o);
108      try {
109         var session = generator.getSession();
110         var root = session.getSchema(o);
111         if (root == null)
112            return null;
113         var defs = session.getBeanDefs();
114         if (defs != null && ! defs.isEmpty())
115            root.append("$defs", defs);
116         return toBean(root);
117      } catch (Exception e) {
118         throw toRex(e);
119      }
120   }
121
122   /**
123    * Converts a generated schema map into a typed bean.
124    *
125    * <p>
126    * Conversion uses a JSON roundtrip to ensure the swaps declared on {@link JsonSchema} are honored.
127    *
128    * @param schemaMap The generated schema map.
129    * @return The typed schema bean.
130    */
131   public static JsonSchema toBean(JsonMap schemaMap) {
132      assertArgNotNull("schemaMap", schemaMap);
133      try {
134         var json = JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(schemaMap);
135         return JsonParser.create().ignoreUnknownBeanProperties().build().parse(json, JsonSchema.class);
136      } catch (ParseException e) {
137         throw toRex(e);
138      }
139   }
140
141   /** Builder for {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator}. */
142   public static final class Builder {
143      private final JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder generatorBuilder = JsonSchemaGenerator.create();
144
145      private Builder() {}
146
147      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory...)}. */
148      public Builder addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory...values) {
149         generatorBuilder.addDescriptionsTo(values);
150         return this;
151      }
152
153      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#addExamplesTo(TypeCategory...)}. */
154      public Builder addExamplesTo(TypeCategory...values) {
155         generatorBuilder.addExamplesTo(values);
156         return this;
157      }
158
159      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedDescriptions()}. */
160      public Builder allowNestedDescriptions() {
161         generatorBuilder.allowNestedDescriptions();
162         return this;
163      }
164
165      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedDescriptions(boolean)}. */
166      public Builder allowNestedDescriptions(boolean value) {
167         generatorBuilder.allowNestedDescriptions(value);
168         return this;
169      }
170
171      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedExamples()}. */
172      public Builder allowNestedExamples() {
173         generatorBuilder.allowNestedExamples();
174         return this;
175      }
176
177      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedExamples(boolean)}. */
178      public Builder allowNestedExamples(boolean value) {
179         generatorBuilder.allowNestedExamples(value);
180         return this;
181      }
182
183      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#beanDefMapper(Class)}. */
184      public Builder beanDefMapper(Class<? extends MarshallingDefMapper> value) {
185         generatorBuilder.beanDefMapper(value);
186         return this;
187      }
188
189      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#ignoreTypes(String...)}. */
190      public Builder ignoreTypes(String...values) {
191         generatorBuilder.ignoreTypes(values);
192         return this;
193      }
194
195      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#useBeanDefs()}. */
196      public Builder useBeanDefs() {
197         generatorBuilder.useBeanDefs();
198         return this;
199      }
200
201      /** Mirrors {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#useBeanDefs(boolean)}. */
202      public Builder useBeanDefs(boolean value) {
203         generatorBuilder.useBeanDefs(value);
204         return this;
205      }
206
207      /** Builds a new generator. */
208      public JsonSchemaBeanGenerator build() {
209         return new JsonSchemaBeanGenerator(this);
210      }
211   }
212}
